moments.title: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals Day
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, continues today with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Quarter-finals.

angles.name: Live Tennis Action
angles.copy: Centre Court drama! It’s Quarter Finals day at Wimbledon. Who are you backing for a spot in the semis?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are ready! We're deep into Wimbledon with the Quarter Finals today. Any British hopefuls left to cheer on?

moments.title: Tour de France Stage 4
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France continues today with Stage 4, a mountain stage from Carcassonne to Foix.

angles.name: Mountain Challenge
angles.copy: The peloton faces a gruelling mountain test today on Stage 4 of the Tour de France! Who will conquer the climbs?

angles.name: Race for Yellow
angles.copy: All eyes on the yellow jersey contenders as the Tour de France heads into the mountains for Stage 4. Every pedal stroke counts!

moments.title: Premier League Transfer Window Buzz
moments.blurb: The summer Premier League transfer window is in full swing with major deals making headlines, including Sandro Tonali to Tottenham and Elliot Anderson to Man City.

angles.name: Transfer Latest
angles.copy: Another day, another huge transfer! Sandro Tonali to Spurs, Elliot Anderson to Man City... who's next in the Premier League spending spree?

angles.name: Football Rumours
angles.copy: The rumour mill is working overtime! What's the biggest Premier League transfer story you're hearing today? Tell us who your club needs!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' marks its 15th non-consecutive week at UK Number 1, equalling Wet Wet Wet's record for a British song.

angles.name: Chart Record Breakers
angles.copy: 15 weeks at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has just made UK chart history. What a track!

angles.name: British Chart Dominance
angles.copy: Move over Wet Wet Wet, there's a new chart legend in town! 'Rein Me In' is a British smash. Is it your favourite Number 1 right now?

moments.title: Madonna's 'Danceteria' set for chart debut
moments.blurb: Madonna's new track 'Danceteria' is on course to be the highest new entry on the Official Singles Chart this week, potentially her 74th Top 40 hit.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Returns
angles.copy: She's still got it! Madonna's 'Danceteria' is heading for a huge chart debut. What's your all-time favourite Madonna track?

angles.name: New Music Alert
angles.copy: Madonna could be landing her 74th Top 40 hit with 'Danceteria'! Tune in to hear the latest from the icon.

moments.title: Love Island UK still heating up
moments.blurb: Season 13 of Love Island UK continues nightly, with the drama from Casa Amor and Movie Night still unfolding ahead of the anticipated final later this month.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? The Casa Amor fallout and Movie Night drama is keeping us glued to the screen!

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: Who's coupling up and who's cracking on? Love Island UK is still delivering the summer's biggest reality TV talking points.

moments.title: Enola Holmes 3 now streaming on Netflix
moments.blurb: Millie Bobby Brown returns as Sherlock's younger sister in 'Enola Holmes 3', which premiered on Netflix UK on July 1st.

angles.name: New on Netflix
angles.copy: Millie Bobby Brown is back as Enola Holmes! Have you started watching the new movie on Netflix yet?

angles.name: Family Mystery
angles.copy: Looking for a family-friendly mystery? Enola Holmes 3 is now streaming, with Sherlock himself getting kidnapped!

moments.title: BTS plays final London show
moments.blurb: K-pop sensation BTS concludes their two-night residency at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium today, marking their only UK shows this tour.

angles.name: K-Pop Takes London
angles.copy: BTS is wrapping up their incredible London residency tonight! Were you lucky enough to catch them at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium?

angles.name: Global Phenomenon
angles.copy: The final night for BTS in London! The K-pop superstars have brought their electrifying show to the capital. What an event!

moments.title: Lily Allen performs at The O2
moments.blurb: British pop icon Lily Allen is performing a headline show at London's O2 Arena tonight.

angles.name: London Gig Night
angles.copy: Lily Allen takes to The O2 stage tonight! What's your favourite hit from the British pop sensation?

angles.name: Pop Queen Live
angles.copy: It's a big night for Lily Allen fans in London! Expect all the hits and more at The O2 tonight.

moments.title: Phantogram plays Glasgow
moments.blurb: American electronic rock duo Phantogram are performing live at SWG3 Warehouse in Glasgow tonight.

angles.name: Glasgow Gig
angles.copy: Phantogram are bringing their unique electronic rock sound to SWG3 in Glasgow tonight! Who's going?

angles.name: Live Electronic Rock
angles.copy: Ready for a dose of Phantogram? They're live in Glasgow tonight delivering their signature blend of rock and electronic beats.

moments.title: 2000trees Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a multi-award-winning independent rock and alternative music festival, begins tomorrow in Gloucestershire, running until July 11th.

angles.name: Festival Season
angles.copy: Get ready for 2000trees! The indie and rock festival kicks off tomorrow in Gloucestershire. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Alternative Vibes
angles.copy: Dust off your wellies! 2000trees Festival starts tomorrow, bringing the best in rock and alternative music to Gloucestershire.

moments.title: Wet Leg live in Manchester
moments.blurb: Indie rock sensation Wet Leg will be performing at Castlefield Bowl as part of Manchester's Sounds of the City series tomorrow.

angles.name: Manchester Gigs
angles.copy: Wet Leg are bringing their infectious energy to Manchester's Castlefield Bowl tomorrow! Who's ready to dance?

angles.name: Sounds of the City
angles.copy: Part of the epic Sounds of the City series, Wet Leg are live in Manchester tomorrow night. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Billy Ocean & Marti Pellow in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Soul legend Billy Ocean, with special guest Marti Pellow of Wet Wet Wet, performs at Cardiff Castle on Thursday.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Concert
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Get Outta My Dreams, Get Into My Car'! Billy Ocean and Marti Pellow are at Cardiff Castle this Thursday. Who's excited?

angles.name: Soul & Pop Legends
angles.copy: Two legends on one stage! Billy Ocean and Marti Pellow bring their classic hits to Cardiff Castle this week. A night of pure nostalgia!

moments.title: Johnny Marr plays Manchester
moments.blurb: The iconic guitarist Johnny Marr performs at Castlefield Bowl in Manchester on Thursday as part of the Sounds of the City series.

angles.name: Indie Icon Live
angles.copy: From The Smiths to solo brilliance! Johnny Marr is live at Castlefield Bowl in Manchester this Thursday. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Manchester Music Scene
angles.copy: A true legend in Manchester tonight! Johnny Marr performs as part of Sounds of the City. Expect an unforgettable show.

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie reboot on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic series 'Little House on the Prairie' begins streaming on Netflix UK from July 9th.

angles.name: Classic Reboot
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip to the American West! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation lands on Netflix tomorrow.

angles.name: Family Viewing
angles.copy: Nostalgia alert! A new generation can discover 'Little House on the Prairie' as it starts streaming on Netflix tomorrow.

moments.title: Bastille live at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning band Bastille will perform at Cardiff Castle on Friday as part of the DEPOT Live series.

angles.name: Cardiff Gig Alert
angles.copy: Bastille are bringing their hits to Cardiff Castle this Friday! Who's excited for a night of indie anthems?

angles.name: Live in Wales
angles.copy: Don't miss Bastille live at Cardiff Castle this Friday! It's set to be an incredible show under the stars.

moments.title: Wireless Festival with Kanye West
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival kicks off Friday at Finsbury Park, London, with Kanye West (Ye) headlining all three nights (July 10-12).

angles.name: Kanye in London
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is back this weekend with Ye headlining! Are you ready for three nights of Kanye in Finsbury Park?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: London's Wireless Festival is almost here! Kanye West takes the stage for what's sure to be a monumental weekend.

moments.title: The Streets in Manchester
moments.blurb: The Streets bring their iconic sound to Manchester's Castlefield Bowl on Friday as part of the Sounds of the City series.

angles.name: Mike Skinner Live
angles.copy: It's gonna be a 'Dry Your Eyes' moment! The Streets are live in Manchester this Friday. Who's excited?

angles.name: Sounds of the City
angles.copy: The legendary Mike Skinner and The Streets are performing at Castlefield Bowl as part of Sounds of the City this Friday. Get ready!

moments.title: David Gray at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter David Gray brings his 'Past & Present Tour' to Cardiff Castle on Saturday.

angles.name: Acoustic Evening
angles.copy: David Gray is set to serenade Cardiff Castle this Saturday! What's your favourite track to hear live?

angles.name: Cardiff Concerts
angles.copy: Don't miss David Gray's 'Past & Present Tour' at Cardiff Castle this weekend. A perfect summer evening of music!

moments.title: My Chemical Romance at Wembley
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance are set to play Wembley Stadium on Saturday, one of three London dates for the iconic rock band.

angles.name: Emo Legends Live
angles.copy: My Chemical Romance are taking over Wembley Stadium this Saturday! Who's ready for a night of epic rock anthems?

angles.name: London Rock Show
angles.copy: Get ready for My Chemical Romance at Wembley! It's going to be a huge night for fans of the iconic band.

moments.title: England Men's World Cup Quarter-Final
moments.blurb: England will face Norway in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals on Saturday, kicking off at 10pm BST in Miami.

angles.name: Three Lions in Quarter-Finals
angles.copy: It's coming home? England take on Norway in the World Cup Quarter-Finals this Saturday! What are your predictions?

angles.name: Big Game Build-up
angles.copy: The countdown is on! England vs Norway in the World Cup Quarter-Finals this Saturday night. Get ready to cheer on the Three Lions!

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on Saturday.

angles.name: Folk Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Saturday! What's your favourite song from the 'Luka' singer?

angles.name: Celebrating a Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Suzanne Vega on Saturday! Her timeless folk-inspired music has graced our airwaves for decades.

moments.title: Chris Packham's 'Evolution' on BBC Two
moments.blurb: A new series presented by Chris Packham, 'Evolution', exploring the secrets of evolution, premieres on BBC Two and iPlayer on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: New Nature Series
angles.copy: Get ready to explore the wonders of 'Evolution' with Chris Packham! His new series starts Monday on BBC Two.

angles.name: Science on TV
angles.copy: Chris Packham is back on our screens next Monday with 'Evolution', delving into the incredible journey of life on Earth. A must-watch!
